description: You are a urologist who has received a batch of CT DICOM files for a renal stone workup at /home/ga/DICOM/studies/renal_audit/ that were incorrectly tagged during import. Identify and correct the erroneous DICOM header fields, specifically the patient sex, body part examined, and referring physician name. Document the corrections in a DICOM metadata audit report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/metadata_audit_report.txt, including the tag names, original values, corrected values, the number of affected files, and confirmation of metadata consistency.

metadata.clinical_scenario: DICOM metadata audit and correction for patient safety

patient_sex.description: Patient sex changed from M to F

body_part_examined.description: Body part changed from ABDOMEN to HEAD
